/usr/bin/ar qc libstreamvbyte.a CMakeFiles/streamvbyte.dir/src/streamvbyte_encode.c.o CMakeFiles/streamvbyte.dir/src/streamvbyte_decode.c.o CMakeFiles/streamvbyte.dir/src/streamvbyte_zigzag.c.o CMakeFiles/streamvbyte.dir/src/streamvbytedelta_encode.c.o CMakeFiles/streamvbyte.dir/src/streamvbytedelta_decode.c.o CMakeFiles/streamvbyte.dir/src/streamvbyte_0124_encode.c.o CMakeFiles/streamvbyte.dir/src/streamvbyte_0124_decode.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libstreamvbyte.a
